# Batch Path Instructions

- Apply this instruction set to the `batch` runtime role.
- Preserve job, module service, mapper XML, SQL doc, and runbook structure.
- Check scheduler, retry, history, deployment checklist, and rollback impact together.
- Read `docs/ai/services/batch.md` before structural batch changes.
- If the repository family is `batch-worker`, combine this with the batch-worker family instruction.
